item.title: A Precision Pair of V-Blocks
item.description: A matched set of V-blocks is crafted for high-accuracy machining and inspection work, ensuring precise alignment for cylindrical components. Small tools, critical precision.

media:content.media:title: A Precision Pair of V-Blocks
media:content.media:description: A matched set of V-blocks is crafted for high-accuracy machining and inspection work, ensuring precise alignment for cylindrical components. Small tools, critical precision.

item.title: Repairing a D11 Bulldozer Cylinder Barrel
item.description: A damaged CAT D11 cylinder barrel undergoes inspection and repair to restore strength, sealing, and performance under extreme loads. Can it be salvaged for heavy-duty use?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a D11 Bulldozer Cylinder Barrel
media:content.media:description: A damaged CAT D11 cylinder barrel undergoes inspection and repair to restore strength, sealing, and performance under extreme loads. Can it be salvaged for heavy-duty use?

item.title: Making Shop-Made Clamp Vices, Part 1
item.description: A step-by-step fabrication project to create shop-made clamp vices, focusing on practical machining and workshop problem-solving. A clever way to build tools using in-house capability.

media:content.media:title: Making Shop-Made Clamp Vices, Part 1
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step fabrication project to create shop-made clamp vices, focusing on practical machining and workshop problem-solving. A clever way to build tools using in-house capability.

item.title: Machining New Pins for a Caterpillar 14M Grader
item.description: New precision-machined pins are produced for a CAT 14M grader to replace worn components and restore tight tolerances. Small parts, big impact on machine performance.

media:content.media:title: Machining New Pins for a Caterpillar 14M Grader
media:content.media:description: New precision-machined pins are produced for a CAT 14M grader to replace worn components and restore tight tolerances. Small parts, big impact on machine performance.

item.title: We SPLIT the Franna in HALF!
item.description: A Franna crane undergoes a full structural split to allow critical access for repair and refurbishment. A complex heavy-duty operation that shows just how far engineers go to restore large machinery safely and effectively

media:content.media:title: We SPLIT the Franna in HALF!
media:content.media:description: A Franna crane undergoes a full structural split to allow critical access for repair and refurbishment. A complex heavy-duty operation that shows just how far engineers go to restore large machinery safely and effectively

item.title: Repairing an Auger Drive Shaft
item.description: A closer look at auger drive shaft damage and the machining approach needed to restore it properly. This repair highlights careful measurement, precision work, and practical machine maintenance.

media:content.media:title: Repairing an Auger Drive Shaft
media:content.media:description: A closer look at auger drive shaft damage and the machining approach needed to restore it properly. This repair highlights careful measurement, precision work, and practical machine maintenance.

item.title: Franna Crane Major Repair
item.description: A Franna crane undergoes extreme disassembly as major structural work requires it to be split for access and repair. A complex process that reveals just how much engineering goes into heavy machinery restoration.

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Major Repair
media:content.media:description: A Franna crane undergoes extreme disassembly as major structural work requires it to be split for access and repair. A complex process that reveals just how much engineering goes into heavy machinery restoration.

item.title: We Needed the Big Lathe for This Machining Job!
item.description: A demanding machining job requires the use of the workshop’s largest lathe, pushing both planning and fabrication to the next level. To support the scale of the work, a custom platform is built from scratch to handle the machine’s size and weight.

media:content.media:title: We Needed the Big Lathe for This Machining Job!
media:content.media:description: A demanding machining job requires the use of the workshop’s largest lathe, pushing both planning and fabrication to the next level. To support the scale of the work, a custom platform is built from scratch to handle the machine’s size and weight.

item.title: Vintage Huron Slotting Attachment Repair!
item.description: A vintage Huron slotting attachment is carefully repaired and restored, bringing an old precision tool back to life for modern use. Can this classic machine still perform at its best?

media:content.media:title: Vintage Huron Slotting Attachment Repair!
media:content.media:description: A vintage Huron slotting attachment is carefully repaired and restored, bringing an old precision tool back to life for modern use. Can this classic machine still perform at its best?

item.title: Jig Borer Upgrade: A Precision Puzzle
item.description: A jig borer is upgraded and refined, turning a complex mechanical challenge into a precision improvement project. How much accuracy can be gained from the upgrade?

media:content.media:title: Jig Borer Upgrade: A Precision Puzzle
media:content.media:description: A jig borer is upgraded and refined, turning a complex mechanical challenge into a precision improvement project. How much accuracy can be gained from the upgrade?

item.title: Removing a Stubborn Gland from a CAT 24M Cylinder
item.description: A seized gland in a CAT 24M cylinder requires careful removal techniques, combining force, precision, and patience. What’s the safest way to break it free?

media:content.media:title: Removing a Stubborn Gland from a CAT 24M Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A seized gland in a CAT 24M cylinder requires careful removal techniques, combining force, precision, and patience. What’s the safest way to break it free?

item.title: CAT 631 Apron Lift Frame Repair
item.description: A CAT 631 apron lift frame undergoes structural repair to restore strength and reliability after heavy wear and stress. Can this massive component be brought back to full working condition?

media:content.media:title: CAT 631 Apron Lift Frame Repair
media:content.media:description: A CAT 631 apron lift frame undergoes structural repair to restore strength and reliability after heavy wear and stress. Can this massive component be brought back to full working condition?

item.title: First Test Runs on the Megabore Lathe
item.description: The first test operations on a Megabore lathe begin, evaluating performance, alignment, and machining accuracy under real working conditions. Does everything run as expected?

media:content.media:title: First Test Runs on the Megabore Lathe
media:content.media:description: The first test operations on a Megabore lathe begin, evaluating performance, alignment, and machining accuracy under real working conditions. Does everything run as expected?

item.title: Making a Mount for a Camera Rig
item.description: A precision-made mount is fabricated for a camera rig, focusing on stability, alignment, and durability. How do you balance strength with fine adjustment in a custom build?

media:content.media:title: Making a Mount for a Camera Rig
media:content.media:description: A precision-made mount is fabricated for a camera rig, focusing on stability, alignment, and durability. How do you balance strength with fine adjustment in a custom build?

item.title: Careful Machining on a Tough CAT 24M Cap
item.description: This cap didn’t want to come out smoothly, but careful machining and patience helped remove the last thin layer. One tough step closer to saving the CAT 24M accumulator. What would you tackle next?

media:content.media:title: Careful Machining on a Tough CAT 24M Cap
media:content.media:description: This cap didn’t want to come out smoothly, but careful machining and patience helped remove the last thin layer. One tough step closer to saving the CAT 24M accumulator. What would you tackle next?

item.title: Helping a Customer Save Thousands
item.description: A smart repair solution helps a customer avoid an expensive replacement, proving that expert workmanship can often save both time and money. How much can the right repair really save?

media:content.media:title: Helping a Customer Save Thousands
media:content.media:description: A smart repair solution helps a customer avoid an expensive replacement, proving that expert workmanship can often save both time and money. How much can the right repair really save?
